coaching_stages.label: Precontemplation
coaching_stages.strategy: Motivational Interviewing — open questions, explore ambivalence, no prescriptions yet.

coaching_stages.label: Contemplation
coaching_stages.strategy: Surface pros/cons; build discrepancy between values and current behaviour.

coaching_stages.label: Preparation
coaching_stages.strategy: Solution-Focused — co-design one small concrete first step this week.

coaching_stages.label: Action
coaching_stages.strategy: Specific programming + strong positive reinforcement on adherence.

coaching_stages.label: Maintenance
coaching_stages.strategy: Relapse-proofing, habit stacking, celebrate streaks; re-entry plan on lapse.
